/* ── PROJECTS ──────────────────────────────────────── */ /* Projects: 3 full-bleed panels, horizontal scroll */ #projects-wrap{ height:100vh; scroll-snap-align:start; scroll-snap-stop:always; position:relative; overflow:hidden; } .proj-scroll{ display:flex; height:100%; overflow:hidden; position:relative; } .proj-panel{ flex:0 0 100%;height:100%; position:relative;overflow:hidden; cursor:none; display:flex;align-items:flex-end; transition:none; } .proj-track{ display:flex; height:100%; width:100%; will-change:transform; transition:transform .9s cubic-bezier(.77,0,.18,1); } .proj-bg{ position:absolute;inset:0; background-size:cover;background-position:center; transform:scale(1.06); transition:transform 1.2s var(--ease); } .proj-panel:hover .proj-bg{transform:scale(1.0);} .proj-overlay{ position:absolute;inset:0; background:linear-gradient( to top, rgba(5,5,5,.95) 0%, rgba(5,5,5,.55) 45%, rgba(5,5,5,.15) 100% ); } .proj-content{ position:relative;z-index:10; padding:0 4rem 4rem;width:100%; display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end; } .proj-left{max-width:520px;} .proj-num{ font-family:'Cormorant Garamond';font-weight:200;font-style:italic; font-size:4.5rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.06);line-height:1; margin-bottom:-.5rem;display:block; } .proj-title{ font-family:'Cormorant Garamond';font-weight:200;font-style:italic; font-size:clamp(2.2rem,3.5vw,3.5rem);color:var(--white); letter-spacing:.02em;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:1rem; } .proj-desc{ font-family:'Inter';font-weight:300;font-size:.72rem; line-height:2;color:rgba(168,168,168,.7);max-width:44ch;margin-bottom:1.8rem; } .proj-tags{display:flex;gap:.7rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:2rem;} .proj-tag{ font-family:'Inter';font-weight:200;font-size:.5rem; letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(168,168,168,.5); border:1px solid rgba(168,168,168,.15);padding:.32rem .85rem; } .proj-right{text-align:right;padding-bottom:.5rem;} /* horizontal dots */ .proj-dots{ position:absolute;bottom:1.8rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%); display:flex;gap:.7rem;z-index:10; } .proj-dot{ width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%; background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);cursor:none; transition:background .35s,transform .35s; } .proj-dot.on{background:var(--white);transform:scale(1.4);}
